description: Download backup fixed for Android PWA + storage protection improvements
changes: 📥 Download backup fixed on Android PWA — now uses Web Share API with file attachment
📥 Download button opens Android share sheet — save to Files, WhatsApp, Telegram etc.
🔒 5-method fallback chain for maximum download compatibility
⚠️ One-time warning if Android 'Manage app if unused' may delete data
🔒 Storage protection status card added in Backup modal
🔒 Persistent storage requested automatically on every app launch
